description_long: This is a robust, large-bodied rhinoceros with a thick, barrel-shaped torso and four sturdy legs. Its skin appears rough and textured, with visible folds and a matte, earthy brown coloration. The head is massive, featuring two prominent horns on the snout, with the front horn being longer and more pointed. The ears are small and pointed, positioned on either side of the head, and the eyes are set deep beneath a heavy brow. The tail is short and ends in a small tuft. The overall form is muscular and powerful, characteristic of a wild rhinoceros adapted for life in open grasslands or savannas.
description: A large, muscular rhinoceros with two prominent horns, rough brown skin, and a powerful build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad head, two horns, and the symmetry of the face and shoulders.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full body profile, both horns, and the textured skin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded hindquarters, short tail, and thick legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body length, horns, and skin texture.
